race.comment: Even contest with plenty of chances. SCUSIES (11) lightly raced filly resuming. Failed to come up last prep with an ordinary fourth over 900m at Albury last December. Back with the solid jump out win over 800m. Winkers come off and expected to go close. ANGLING FOR INFO (1) progressive gelding who resumes from a lengthy break. Showed blistering speed from the wide gate with a fighting on-pace second over 1175m at Albury last October. Slick jump out winner over 800m at Wodonga. Maps well and has a host of gear changes for this. BELLA KATELYN (7) Toronado mare from Belavynshi on debut for the Weeding yard. Both jump outs had merit and looks ready to go from the good gate. SIYAASI (6) Capitalist gelding from Sheikha on debut for the McVicar yard. Has shown potential in a recent trial and jump out. Keep safe despite drawing out.
